title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 196.542 - Fees for licenses
text:
196.542.  Fees for licenses. — The state milk board* shall establish the fees for all licenses by regulation promulgated in accordance with chapter 536.
(L. 1981 H.B. 52) 
*See Reorganization Plan No. 5 of 1982 on file with the Secretary of State.
